title: T-084 — Technical sensory evaluation contract/read model
prompt:
# T-084 — Technical sensory evaluation contract/read model

Add the Technical-owned sensory evaluation contract/read model needed by NPD approval policy. NPD may mark sensory N/A/not_required unless org policy requires Technical sensory evidence, but Technical must own the reusable contract: sensory panels/sessions, attributes, pass/fail/hold result, linked item/project/work_order, evidence attachments, reviewer, and read API for NPD/Quality. Docs/meta task only defines implementation contract and tests; no prototype code.

pipeline_inputs.details: Define a Technical-owned sensory evaluation contract/read model for product/project/work-order sensory evidence. NPD approval may treat sensory as N/A/not_required unless org policy requires it; this task gives NPD and Quality a stable Technical read adapter for required/pending/pass/fail/hold states without moving NPD gate ownership into Technical. Include schema/API contract and tests only; no UI/prototype implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Given org policy requires sensory for a product, Technical read model exposes required/pending/pass/fail status to NPD approval.
Given sensory is not required, adapter returns not_required and NPD can proceed without fake Technical evidence.
Given sensory result is fail/hold, downstream release guards can show SENSORIAL_BLOCKED reason.
test_strategy: RED contract tests for required/not_required/pass/fail/hold mapping.
risk_red_lines: Do not move NPD gate ownership into Technical.
Do not implement external lab/sensory vendor integrations.
